title: macrolobium discolor
intro: Macrolobium discolor, also known as the Pink Coral Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its alkaloid and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Macrolobium discolor include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are typically made by boiling the bark or leaves in water.
